# Cheetah Ping

> Website change monitoring service. Monitor any webpage and get alerted the moment something changes.

## What is Cheetah Ping?

Cheetah Ping is a consumer-focused website change monitor. Users paste a URL, choose what to watch (whole page, specific section, or a keyword), and get email/Slack/Discord alerts when something changes. Checks run as frequently as every minute.

## Use Cases

- Job seekers: Get alerted when new roles are posted on career pages
- Apartment hunters: Know the moment a new listing appears
- Restock tracking: Get notified when sold-out products come back in stock
- Price monitoring: Track price changes on any product page
- Visa/appointment slots: Get alerted when appointment slots open up

## Key Features

- AI-powered URL analysis (auto-detects what to monitor)
- AI change summaries (plain-English descriptions of what changed)
- Checks as fast as every 60 seconds
- Email, Slack, and Discord notifications
- CSS selector targeting (monitor specific page sections)
- Keyword monitoring (alert when a word appears or disappears)

## Pricing

- Free: 5 monitors, checks every 24 hours
- Starter ($9/mo): 10 monitors, checks every 15 minutes
- Pro ($19/mo): 50 monitors, checks every 5 minutes
- Ultra ($49/mo): 25 monitors, checks every minute
